title: "assert" causes "malformed statement"
body:
Using Icarus Verilog version 10.1 (stable) (v10_1_1)

With this code:
```
module assert_tb;
   reg someValue;

   initial begin
      someValue = 0;
      assert(someValue == 0) else $error("Tragic.");
   end
endmodule // assert_tb
```

I get this result:
```
% iverilog -g2012 assert_tb.sv
assert_tb.sv:6: syntax error
assert_tb.sv:6: error: malformed statement
```

Any thoughts? I miss my asserts.
code_blocks:
% iverilog -g2012 assert_tb.sv
assert_tb.sv:6: syntax error
assert_tb.sv:6: error: malformed statement
